series_metadata.series_description: Monthly or quarterly reports that are generated by VR administration that provide an overview on case work and services to consumers. (Not to be confused with Ad Hoc reports pulled by the field for various usage). Records may include: Caseload Summary Report; Current Year Activity Report; Cooperative Agreement With BWC; Quality and Compliance Review; Management Information Report; Minority Ethnicity Report; Rehabilitation Characteristics Report; and any additional report managed in this manner by VR administration.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for two (2) federal fiscal years from the fiscal year generated. ; Electronic: Retain for two (2) federal fiscal years from the fiscal year generated., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
